core_principles: Mobile-first and touch-friendly for field usage.
High contrast and minimal text to ensure readability in sunlight.
Progressive disclosure: complex data hidden until requested.
Trust-building UI with clear disease severity and treatment paths.

headings.usage_rules: Tracking-tight, never use pure black, tint to dark green.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous touch targets (p-6 to p-8 internally on cards), strict grid hierarchy for dashboards.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Grid cols-1 on mobile, md:grid-cols-3 or 4 on desktop. Dense but clear widget sizing.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Flat Solid surfaces. NO glassmorphism (reduces outdoor legibility). 1px subtle border (#DDE3DA) and soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm). Cards have rounded-2xl.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align data and inputs. Center-align empty states and hero.

navigation.style: Sticky top bar, solid background (#FFFFFF), border-b (#DDE3DA).
navigation.elements: Logo, Language Toggle (EN/HI/MR dropdown), Profile menu.

upload_zone.style: Large dashed border (border-2 border-dashed border-[#8B9D77]), bg-[#E8ECE5]/50, min-h-[300px] flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl transition-all hover:bg-[#E8ECE5].
upload_zone.interactions: Hover state darkens background. 'Scanning' state uses 'Tracing Beam' animation around the image.

results_dashboard.layout: Bento grid. Left: Scanned Image with bounding boxes. Right: Disease Info, Severity Badge, Confidence Score. Bottom: Treatment steps & Syngenta product recs.
results_dashboard.severity_badges: Rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-bold. Red for High, Yellow for Medium.

history_list.layout: Vertical list of cards. Each card has a 64x64 thumbnail, Date, Disease Title, Severity Badge.
history_list.interactions: Clicking a row opens a detailed view modal/sheet.

data_tables.usage: For Admin Dashboard only. Use Shadcn Table. Clear hover rows, sticky header.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-md for actionable cards.
motion_and_interactions.scanning_effect: A moving linear gradient or tracing beam over the image container to simulate AI analysis.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Fade in with subtle upward translation (framer-motion opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0).

hero_background.description: Lush green sugarcane field with cinematic lighting and subtle digital grid, used for auth screens or hero banners.

scanning_leaf.description: Macro shot of a sugarcane leaf with scanning UI, use as a placeholder for the scanning process.

alert_texture.description: Earthy red/yellow textured background, use for severe disease alert banners.

farmer_context.description: Farmer using smartphone outdoors, great for onboarding or about section.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text on primary buttons meets 4.5:1 WCAG.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: MANDATORY. Every button, input, tab, and card must have a data-testid. E.g., data-testid='upload-image-button', data-testid='disease-severity-badge'.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard `div` and `section` for layouts. For interactive components, strictly customize Shadcn.
Admin and User flows should be protected routes. Show a clean Login screen with role selection.
For the multi-model prediction feature, mock the backend call. The UI should show a comparison card with 'Model 1 (User .pt)' and 'Model 2 (System)' resolving into a final combined prediction.
Implement internationalization (i18n) structurally. Have a language context that switches static strings between English, Hindi, and Marathi.
Ensure the design does NOT look like a default SaaS app. Infuse the earthy green colors heavily into borders, hover states, and active tabs.
Do NOT use `transparent` backgrounds for headers. Use `#FFFFFF`.
